SQLLite.SQL: (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*) , 0, 'false','true') as "WarrantExists" , ${param.warrantType} as "WarrantType" FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT (W.CO_NUMBER) FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND W.WARRANT_TYPE = ${param.warrantType} AND W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT WR.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR , RETURN_CODES RC WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NOT NULL AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE IN ('0', WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE) ) ) )
